examples: The second part of this study observed the effects of EPCs to athymic nude mice with hindlimb ischemia.
Objective to explore the phenotype changing of human epidermis transplanted to subcutaneous area of athymic mouse.
Recent research revealed that the cure rate of the breast and prostate cancer in athymic mouse were up to 40% or 50% when a mutant of S. typhimurium A1-R was treated alone.
